title: papaver chelidoniifolium var. pinnatum
intro: Papaver chelidoniifolium var. pinnatum, also known as the Himalayan poppy, is a plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family and is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Papaver chelidoniifolium var. pinnatum are attributed to its alkaloids, including protopine and sanguinarine, which have analgesic and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a useful remedy for arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The herbal preparations of Papaver chelidoniifolium var. pinnatum include its use in traditional medicine as a tincture or infusion, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity.
